Properties
  NameDescription
DefaultValue
Description
HttpVerbs
Gets or sets a set of HTTP verbs. If the set is non-empty, then the request parameter is only available for these verbs.
IsInQuery
Gets or sets a value indicating whether the parameter is part of the URL query or the URL path.
